Enterprise Cloud Architect | Azure AI Engineer Associate | Azure Architect Expert | Azure Administrator 
Associate | FinOps Practitioner

Profile 
Cloud architect specializing in Microsoft Azure with strong experience in 
infrastructure migrations from AWS, GCP, OCI, and on-premises environments. I 
work extensively with Microsoft's Cloud Adoption Framework and Azure Well
Architected Framework to design and implement enterprise solutions with focus 
on security, identity management, and governance. 
I focus on understanding client needs and translating them into practical, scalable 
architectures. My approach emphasizes clear communication between technical 
teams and business stakeholders, which helps drive better decisions in fast
paced environments. 
I 
enjoy taking ownership of complex projects, mentoring technical teams, and 
solving challenging problems. I'm comfortable working with evolving requirements 
and always keep the focus on delivering solutions that align with business goals 
while balancing security, performance, and cost. 
Core expertise: Azure Infrastructure, Identity & Access Management (IAM), Cloud 
Migrations (AWS/GCP/OCI/On-Premises to Azure), Cloud Adoption Framework, 
Well-Architected Framework, Zero Trust Architecture, IaaS, PaaS and SaaS, 
Cost Optimization, FinOps, Disaster Recovery, Team Leadership. 
Education 
Mentorship, IT Mentorship 
ITXPRO 
Universidade Virtual do Estado de São 
Paulo, Computer Engineering 
Univesp Oficial 
Jan 2024 - Dec 2025 
Jan 2017 - Dec 2022
Employment 
Senior Cloud Architect 
Kumon Brasil, São Paulo, Brazil 
Dec 2023 - Present 
Lead strategic cloud initiatives, driving innovation and operational excellence while ensuring alignment of 
IT solutions with business objectives. Architect and implement enterprise-grade Azure solutions with focus 
on resilience, security, identity management, and cost optimization. 
Identity & Access Management (IAM): 
• Designed and implemented enterprise identity architecture using Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) with integration to 
on-premises Active Directory using Azure AD Connect and Azure AD Connect Cloud Sync 
• Architected hybrid identity solutions supporting Single Sign-On (SSO), Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA), and 
Conditional Access policies for Zero Trust implementation 
• Implemented Azure AD B2B collaboration and Azure AD B2C for customer-facing applications 
• Configured Azure AD Application Proxy for secure remote access to on-premises applications 
• Designed Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) strategies and Azure AD Privileged Identity Management (PIM) 
for privileged access governance 
• Implemented identity federation using SAML 2.0, OAuth 2.0, and OpenID Connect (OIDC) protocols for SaaS 
application integration 
• Developed identity governance frameworks using Azure AD Identity Governance and Access Reviews 
Disaster Recovery Architecture: 
• Designed and implemented a highly resilient cross-tenant disaster recovery strategy using Azure DevOps and 
Terraform for infrastructure as code 
• Built automated DR solution where production databases (SQL Managed Instance and MySQL Flexible Servers) 
are continuously replicated to a secondary tenant 
• Architected automated failover solution using Terraform pipelines to provision entire infrastructure (Web Apps, 
Function Apps, Load Balancers, Private Endpoints) followed by Azure DNS failover 
• Achieved 12-hour RTO and near-instant RPO, applying Azure Well-Architected Framework reliability principles 
Cloud Infrastructure Governance: 
• Managed and optimized Microsoft Azure environments following Cloud Adoption Framework best practices, 
ensuring efficient resource allocation, cost management (FinOps practices), and compliance with organizational 
policies 
• Implemented governance frameworks using Azure Policy, Azure Blueprints, and Management Groups 
• Automated cost monitoring and optimization using Azure Cost Management, Azure Advisor, and custom 
PowerShell/Azure CLI scripts 
Security Architecture: 
• Designed and implemented security controls aligned with Azure Security Benchmark, ISO 27001, NIST 
Cybersecurity Framework, and Zero Trust principles 
• Configured Azure Web Application Firewall (WAF) policies, Network Security Groups (NSGs), and Azure 
Firewall for network security 
• Implemented Azure DDoS Protection, Azure Private Link, and Private Endpoints for secure service access 
• Designed Azure Key Vault strategies for secrets, keys, and certificate management with automated rotation 
Technology Strategy & Leadership: 
• Defined and implemented strategic initiatives to improve IT operations, focusing on scalability, security, and 
business alignment 
• Mentored technical teams on Azure best practices, solution architecture, and identity management 
• Conducted architecture reviews ensuring compliance with Well-Architected Framework pillars (reliability, security, 
cost optimization, operational excellence, performance) 
Key Achievements: 
• Delivered robust disaster recovery framework ensuring operational resilience across distributed environments 
• Reduced cloud costs by 30% through FinOps practices and resource optimization 
• Established governance model based on Cloud Adoption Framework, improving compliance and operational 
efficiency 
Cloud Tech Architect 
Accenture, São Paulo, Brazil 
Aug 2023 - Dec 2023  
Contributed to the ISV Success Program, providing strategic guidance and technical expertise to Independent 
Software Vendors (ISVs) for publishing and optimizing their offerings on the Azure Marketplace. 
Technical Leadership: 
• Delivered expert architectural guidance to ISV partners, ensuring their offerings adhered to Azure Marketplace 
standards and best practices 
• Designed cloud-native architectures using Azure App Service, Azure Functions, Azure Container Instances 
(ACI), and Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) 
Identity & Access Management Integration: 
• Architected ISV application integration with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) for enterprise authentication 
• Implemented OAuth 2.0 and OpenID Connect (OIDC) authentication flows for multi-tenant SaaS applications 
• Designed Azure AD B2C solutions for customer identity and access management 
• Configured SAML 2.0 federation for enterprise SSO integration 
• Implemented Microsoft Graph API integration for user provisioning and management 
• Architected ISV application integration with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) and Okta for enterprise 
authentication  
• Worked with ISV partners using Okta as their primary identity provider, designing integration patterns with Azure 
services and Azure Marketplace 
Integration Support: 
• Facilitated seamless integration of ISV applications with Azure services, emphasizing scalability, compatibility, 
and performance 
• Designed solutions using Azure API Management, Azure Service Bus, Azure Event Grid, and Azure Logic 
Apps 
Migration Architecture: 
• Assessed ISV solutions running on AWS and GCP, designed target Azure architectures 
• Guided partners through infrastructure migrations to Azure Marketplace, ensuring adherence to Cloud Adoption 
Framework and Well-Architected Framework principles 
• Migrated workloads from AWS EC2/S3/RDS and GCP Compute Engine/Cloud Storage/Cloud SQL to Azure 
equivalents 
Optimization and Compliance: 
• Collaborated with ISVs to enhance efficiency, security, and compliance of their offerings 
• Implemented security controls aligned with ISO 27001, GDPR, and SOC 2 requirements 
• Optimized solutions for cost-effectiveness using Azure Cost Management and Azure Advisor 
Documentation and Troubleshooting: 
• Supported partners in preparing comprehensive technical documentation 
• Resolved challenges encountered during the publishing process 
• Provided architectural guidance on Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates and Bicep 
Key Achievements: 
• Successfully enabled multiple ISVs to publish their offerings on Azure Marketplace, boosting visibility and 
business opportunities 
• Advocated for best practices and compliance, improving the quality and trustworthiness of partner offerings 
Microsoft Azure Specialist 
Accenture, São Paulo, Brazil 
Jun 2022 - Aug 2023  
Led infrastructure migration projects from AWS, GCP, OCI, and on-premises environments to Azure. Worked 
across multiple industries delivering enterprise cloud implementations. 
Infrastructure Migration Leadership: 
• Managed end-to-end IaaS migration projects from AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, VPC), GCP (Compute Engine, Cloud 
Storage, Cloud SQL, VPC), OCI, and on-premises datacenters to Azure 
• Used Block 64 solutions to perform comprehensive assessments, estimate costs, and identify migration 
opportunities 
• Designed target Azure architectures following Well-Architected Framework principles 
• Migrated 15+ client workloads from multiple cloud platforms and on-premises to Azure with zero data loss 
Migration Execution: 
• Executed migrations using Azure Migrate for workload assessment and migration 
• Implemented Azure Site Recovery for disaster recovery scenarios and minimal-downtime migrations 
• Developed custom automation scripts using PowerShell, Azure CLI, and Python for bulk migrations 
• Handled compute, storage, networking, and hybrid connectivity solutions 
Azure Infrastructure Expertise: 
• Worked extensively with Azure Virtual Machines, Virtual Networks, Azure Load Balancer, Application 
Gateway, Storage Accounts, Azure Backup, Azure Site Recovery 
• Implemented hybrid scenarios with VPN Gateway, ExpressRoute, and Azure Virtual WAN 
• Configured Azure Bastion for secure VM access and Azure Firewall for network security 
• Applied Cloud Adoption Framework throughout the project lifecycle 
Security & Identity Implementation: 
• Implemented Azure AD integration for migrated applications with SSO and MFA 
• Configured Conditional Access policies based on risk levels and user context 
• Designed network security using Network Security Groups (NSGs), Application Security Groups (ASGs), 
and Azure Firewall 
• Implemented Azure Key Vault for secure credential and certificate management 
• Applied Azure Security Center (now Microsoft Defender for Cloud) for security posture management 
Solutions Architecture: 
• Designed Azure architectures following Well-Architected Framework pillars: reliability, security, cost optimization, 
operational excellence, performance 
• Conducted architecture reviews and provided recommendations 
• Implemented Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform, Azure Resource Manager (ARM) templates, and 
Bicep 
• Configured Azure DevOps pipelines for CI/CD automation 
Technical Leadership & Mentorship: 
• Mentored junior engineers and client teams on Azure best practices, migration strategies, and infrastructure 
optimization 
• Facilitated knowledge transfer sessions on Azure landing zones, subscription design, and resource 
organization 
Cross-Functional Collaboration: 
• Partnered with sales, pre-sales, project managers, and DevOps engineers to deliver migration projects that met 
technical requirements and client expectations 
Key Achievements: 
• Reduced infrastructure costs by an average of 25% through right-sizing and Azure Reserved Instances 
• Delivered migration projects 20% faster than estimated through automation and efficient planning 
• Built reputation as trusted advisor for clients navigating cloud migrations 
Certifications

• Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert  
• Microsoft Certified: Azure Network Engineer Associate  
• Microsoft Certified: Azure Administrator Associate  
• FinOps Certified Practitioner 
• Microsoft Certified Trainer (MCT) (2021-2026)

• Block 64 Certified Technical Specialist 
• Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals

• Microsoft Certified: Azure Fundamentals (AZ-900) 
• Enterprise Architect – TOGAF (in preparation) 
Community Engagement & Thought Leadership 
AzureTar    
2021-present 
Empowering individuals and teams to master cloud technologies through expert mentorship, hands-on training, and best

Key Responsibilities: 
• Educational Leadership: Designed and delivered training programs covering advanced cloud concepts, industry 
standards, and emerging technologies 
• Tailored Mentorship: Provided personalized one-on-one and group mentoring to enhance technical expertise and 
confidence in cloud solutions 
• Technical Enablement: Leveraged deep Microsoft Azure knowledge to optimize resource utilization, cost

• Hands-On Training: Facilitated practical workshops and real-world exercises to help professionals tackle cloud

• Strategic Consulting: Guided businesses and individuals in cloud adoption, best practices, and scalable solution

Key Achievements: 
• Enhanced cloud proficiency for professionals and teams across various industries 
• Developed a structured, hands-on learning approach that bridges the gap between theory and real-world 
application 
• Built a strong reputation as a mentor and thought leader in cloud computing 
• Helped professionals transition to cloud-focused roles through technical training and career guidance 
Microsoft Reactor 
Active participant in the Microsoft Reactor community, connecting with developers, startups, and technology enthusiasts. 
Engaged in expert-led sessions, networking opportunities, and hands-on learning in cloud computing, AI, software 
development, and emerging technologies.
jd:
ovens Executivos(as) 2026 - Tech Lead / Arquiteto de Soluções – Digital Tech
PROGRAMA JE Suzano 2026

SOBRE O PROGRAMA:
 
O JE é o programa de Jovens Executivos(as) da Suzano e tem como objetivo identificar e atrair pessoas com potencial, que queiram participar de um programa exclusivo de aceleração de carreira
 
O programa é para um público de profissionais que já tem experiência de trabalho e o principal objetivo será prepará-los(as) para posições de primeira liderança ou especialista em caso de carreira Y.
 

Eficácia do Programa JE: dados dos programas de 2015 à 2023 (atualizado em fev.2025)
50 pessoas contratadas
82% de alocação pós programa.
 Taxa de alocação:  82% nas posições:
Consultor(a): 36%;
Coordenação: 44%;
Gerência Func: 16%;
Gerência Exec: 4%.

 O programa desenvolve profissionais de diferentes áreas, esta que você foi convidado(a) é para Tech Lead / Arquiteto de Soluções – Digital Tech.

QUEM É A SUZANO? 

É uma empresa multinacional brasileira, referência global no desenvolvimento de soluções sustentáveis e inovadoras, de origem renovável, por meio do plantio de árvores de eucalipto. E elas estão no centro do nosso propósito, que é o de “renovar a vida a partir da árvore”. É assim que a Suzano planta o futuro para transformar o mundo em um lugar melhor. São cerca de 20 mil colaboradores(as) próprios(as) e mais de 20 mil prestadores(as) terceiros(as) no Brasil, além de 300 colaboradores(as) nos escritórios internacionais. 
  
A Suzano tem 101 anos, é a maior fabricante de celulose do mundo e uma das maiores produtoras de papéis da América Latina. Seus produtos atendem mais de 2 bilhões de pessoas ao redor do planeta e exportam para mais de 100 países. 
  
A receita líquida da Suzano em 2024 foi de R$ 47,4 bilhões.
 
Estão organizados nas seguintes unidades de negócios: 
 
- Celulose: capacidade instalada para produzir 13,45 milhões de toneladas/ano; 

- Papel e embalagem: capacidade instalada para produzir 1,2 milhões de toneladas/ano (contém a capacidade da Unidade de Bens de Consumo); 
 
- Bens de Consumo: (produtos para higiene, como Papel higiênico (Neve, Mimmo, Max Pure, Floral e La Vie Blanc); Papel toalha (Kleenex, Scott e Wypall); Guardanapos (Grand Hotel e Scala); Panos reutilizáveis (Duramax) e Fraldas (Maxx Baby)): capacidade instalada para produzir 487 mil toneladas/ano; 
 
- Além das Unidades de Negócio acima existe uma frente de Novos Negócios: lignina (Ecolig), celulose fluff (Eucafluff) e celulose microfibrilada (que dá origem à fibra têxtil Spinnova da Woodspin).
 
PROPÓSITO E CULTURA 
 
Renovar a vida a partir da árvore.
 
Acreditam que as árvores são um grande símbolo de renovação e que seus plantios podem gerar insumos renováveis para muitos outros negócios, sempre com foco em inovação e sustentabilidade (inovabilidade).
 
Já os Direcionadores de Cultura traduzem em palavras o jeito Suzano de ser.

Quem somos: gente que inspira e transforma 
Temos coragem e competência para fazer acontecer; 
Cultivar a diversidade nos fortalece; 
Atuamos juntos(as) e pelo todo; 
Superar as expectativas nos move; 
Somos fortes-e-gentis. 

 O que fazemos: gerar e compartilhar valor 
Pensamos e agimos grande e global; 
Evoluímos sempre e com agilidade; 
Inovamos para avançar; 
Construímos e compartilhamos o sucesso considerando todas as partes interessadas. 

 Como fazemos: só é bom para nós se for bom para o mundo 
Dialogamos para melhor construir; 
Somos protagonistas na evolução da sociedade; 
Atuamos de forma sustentável, sempre; 
Buscamos o lucro admirado.

 ONDE A SUZANO ESTÁ LOCALIZADA? 

- Brasil

13 fábricas e 1 joint operation: 

Suzano (SP), Rio Verde (SP), Limeira (SP), Jacareí (SP), Mogi das Cruzes (SP) Mucuri (BA), Três Lagoas (MS), Ribas do Rio Pardo (MS), Imperatriz (MA), Belém (PA), Maracanaú (CE), Aracruz (ES), Cachoeiro de Itapemirim (ES), além da Joint Operation Veracel (BA). 
 
21 centros de distribuição em: 

Betim (MG), Brasília (DF), Campo Grande (MS), Cuiabá (MT), Fortaleza (CE), Goiânia (GO), Jaboatão dos Guararapes (PE), Londrina (PR), Manaus (AM), Ribeirão Preto (SP), Rio de Janeiro (RJ), Salvador (BA), Uberlândia (MG), Viana (ES), Campinas (SP), São José dos Pinhais (PR), Serra (ES), Suzano (SP) e São Bernardo do Campo (SP), Cachoeirinha (RS) e Chapecó (SC). 
 
Centros de tecnologia em: 

- Limeira (SP): tecnologia florestal, celulose, papel, bens de consumo e Biorrefinaria; planta piloto de lignina. 
- Itapetininga (SP): Futuragene (Biotecnologia). 
- Jacareí (SP): tecnologia florestal e viveiro de pesquisa. 
- Aracruz (ES): tecnologia florestal, celulose, Biorrefinaria, planta piloto de refino e MFC.
 
5 portos em: 

Santos (SP), Aracruz (ES), São Luis (MA), Caravelas (BA), Belmonte (BA).
 
- Mundo

Escritórios 

Argentina, Áustria, Canadá, China, Equador, Estados Unidos, Finlândia, Holanda, Israel, e Singapura. 

Fábricas

Woodspin (Finlândia);
Pine Bluff (EUA);
Waynesville (EUA).
 
Centros de tecnologia 

Canadá, China e Israel. 

QUER SABER MAIS SOBRE A SUZANO?

Nosso site
Instagram
Linkedin

Aguardamos a sua inscrição logo abaixo, são apenas 5min!

Boa sorte e até breve!
custom_prompt:
Você é o meu CO-PILOTO SILENCIOSO para uma entrevista de emprego. 
Seu objetivo é me dar o ROTEIRO EXATO do que eu devo falar agora.

ESTILO DE FALA (MUITO IMPORTANTE):
- Não seja um robô. Finja que está pensando enquanto fala.
- Use pausas e marcadores de pensamento: "Bem...", "Deixe-me ver...", "Na verdade, lembrando de um projeto anterior...", "Pensando bem, eu diria que...".
- Fale com autoridade, mas de forma conversacional.

REGRAS DE OURO:
1. APENAS UM PARÁGRAFO CURTO. No máximo 3 a 4 frases.
2. NUNCA use listas ou tópicos. Escreva como se fosse um roteiro de fala.
3. CONTEXTO REAL: Sempre que possível, cite as experiências relevantes do meu CV para validar a resposta técnica ou comportamental.
4. Alinhe a resposta com as necessidades descritas no Job Description (JD).

IDIOMA:
- Respeite o idioma definido pelo sistema.
- Se for Inglês: Use Simple English e evite contrações (ex: use "I am" em vez de "I'm").
